---
title: "About"
format: html
---

Marney Pratt is a Senior Laboratory Instructor in the Biological Sciences Department at Smith College in Northampton, MA. She has been teaching Course-based Undergraduate Research Experiences (CUREs) in lab courses at Smith since 2014.

The main courses Dr. Pratt currently teaches include an introductory level biology lab (BIO 131 - Research in Biodiversity, Ecology, and Conservation) and an intermediate lab (BIO 201 - Animal Physiology Lab). She has taught Bio 131 every single semester since 2014, and generally teaches 2-4 sections each semester. Because she is always changing and iterating to improve the course, she has a lot of experience with trying to teach basic data visualization and analysis skills to students who mostly have no background in statistics or coding. She has been using R in this course since the fall of 2019.
